description: AgriSync analytics-migration deploy. The ONLY runbook the agent-deployer role can SendCommand. Pulls a specific SHA, verifies it, applies AnalyticsDbContext migrations against the prod DB (read from Secrets Manager), and prints structured evidence. Non-destructive: no DROP, no RESTORE, no SG/IAM/secret mutations. EF Down() throws by design — no migration rollback inside this document.

DeploySha.description: Exact 7-40 char git SHA to deploy. Must already exist on origin/akash_edits. The agent script verifies CI green before invoking; this document re-verifies at execution time.

AllowedMigrationFiles.description: Space-separated list of migration filenames the deploy is allowed to apply. The script aborts if any unexpected migration file is present in the checked-out tree under src/AgriSync.Bootstrapper/Migrations/Analytics/. Belt + braces against the operator pinning a SHA that quietly contains additional migrations.

ForbiddenMigrationFiles.description: Space-separated list of migration filenames whose presence in the tree at DeploySha aborts the deploy. Catches accidental SHA-mismatch where the operator picked a HEAD that includes WIP work. Default reflects DWC v2 / WTL work that's explicitly out of scope.

RepoCheckoutPath.description: Filesystem path on the EC2 box where the repo is checked out for deploys. Operator-set; documented in the architecture doc.

SecretId.description: Secrets Manager secret holding the prod DB connection strings. The script does NOT print the value — only confirms it resolved.

AwsRegion.description: AWS region for Secrets Manager + downstream calls.

runCommand: trap 'echo "::error::FAILED at line $LINENO. Stopping. NO ROLLBACK performed (rollback requires explicit operator approval per the deploy-lane policy)."' ERR
echo '== AgriSync analytics-migration deploy via SSM       =='
echo "::error::No git repo at $REPO. Operator must clone akash_edits there first."
echo "current HEAD: $(git rev-parse HEAD) (will be replaced)"
echo '--- PHASE 2: fetch + verify SHA exists ---'
echo "::error::SHA {{DeploySha}} not found in repo after fetch. Aborting."
echo '--- PHASE 3: checkout SHA + verify clean ---'
echo "::error::Checkout mismatch. Expected prefix-match with {{DeploySha}}, got $ACTUAL_SHA."
echo '--- PHASE 4: allowlist + forbidlist migration audit ---'
echo "::error::Forbidden migration file $f present in checked-out SHA. Operator pinned a SHA that includes out-of-scope work. Aborting."
echo '--- PHASE 5: resolve connection string from Secrets Manager ---'
echo "::error::Secret {{SecretId}} has placeholder value for ConnectionStrings:AnalyticsDb. Operator must populate it before this lane is usable. Aborting."
echo 'AnalyticsDb connection string resolved (value not printed).'
echo "$ANALYTICS_CONN" | xargs -I{} $PSQL '{}' -c 'SELECT "MigrationId" FROM analytics."__analytics_migrations_history" ORDER BY 1;' || echo '(query failed; continuing — non-fatal for evidence)'
echo "$ANALYTICS_CONN" | xargs -I{} $PSQL '{}' -c "SELECT matviewname FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname='mis' ORDER BY 1;" || echo '(query failed; continuing)'
echo '--- PHASE 7: dotnet ef database update ---'
echo "::error::src/AgriSync.Bootstrapper not present at this SHA. Aborting."
dotnet ef database update --project src/AgriSync.Bootstrapper --context AnalyticsDbContext --connection "$ANALYTICS_CONN" --configuration Release
echo "$ANALYTICS_CONN" | xargs -I{} $PSQL '{}' -c "SELECT matviewname, NULL::INT AS rows FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname='mis' ORDER BY 1;"
echo '  1. NON-CONCURRENT initial population SQL — runbook step 6.'
echo '  2. Smoke admin dashboard — runbook step 7.'
echo 'This document does NOT run those steps. They are operator-gated to keep blast radius minimal.'
